To be heard in department 501, the real property court, on April 7, 2025 at 9:30am. That department handles all real property cases per Local Rule 8.10A1. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To Mar-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PROVIDENT FUNDING ASSOCIATES, L.P.. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant's demurrer is continued to Friday, March 21, 2025, at 9 a.m. in this department. The court will consider Plaintiff's late filed opposition, if Plaintiff delivers a courtesy copy to this department no later than close of business Tuesday, March 11, 2025. Plaintiff may file a reply brief no later than Friday, March 14, 2025, with a courtesy copy promptly provided to the department. Plaintiff is advised they must familiarize themselves with the procedural and substantive law, including the requirements for filing of papers, and comply therewith.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
